title: Chapter 39

Before I begin, I would like to state an issue.

There was a heated debate in a chapter regarding NTR and whatnot. Now I don't intend to criticize anyone over their preferences and what one interprets an idea on their own.

I hope no one feels offended by this and views it as a positive request.

Stay safe and enjoy!
